subject: Civics
chapter: Parliament and the Making of Laws

activities_projects.title: Structure of Parliament Diagram
activities_projects.objective: Understand the structure of the Indian Parliament
steps: Read about the structure of Parliament in the textbook
Draw a diagram showing Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha
Write one role of each house

activities_projects.title: Role of Members of Parliament
steps: Write three responsibilities of a Member of Parliament
Explain how MPs represent the people
Give one example of how MPs raise issues in Parliament
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the role of representatives in democracy

activities_projects.title: Steps in Law Making
activities_projects.objective: Understand the process through which laws are made
steps: Read the section on how laws are made
Write the main steps involved in making a law
Arrange them in the correct order
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the process of law-making in Parliament

activities_projects.title: Debate Activity
activities_projects.objective: Experience how debates happen in Parliament
steps: Choose a topic such as 'mobile phones in school'
Divide the class into two groups for and against the topic
Discuss and write the key points from both sides

activities_projects.title: Public Issues and Laws
activities_projects.objective: Understand how public issues lead to new laws
steps: Identify a problem in society such as pollution or road safety
Explain how people raise this issue
Write how Parliament can make a law to solve it

activities_projects.title: Question Hour Research
activities_projects.objective: Learn about Question Hour in Parliament
steps: Read about Question Hour in the textbook
Write what happens during Question Hour
Explain why it is important in democracy

activities_projects.title: Role Play of a Parliamentary Session
activities_projects.objective: Understand how decisions are made in Parliament
steps: Assign roles such as Speaker, MPs and ministers
Discuss a classroom issue
Vote to decide the final rule

activities_projects.title: Comparing Rules and Laws
activities_projects.objective: Understand the difference between rules and laws
steps: Write three rules followed in your school
Write three laws followed in society
Explain how both help maintain order
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the importance of rules and laws

activities_projects.title: Poster on Law Making
steps: Create a poster showing the steps of law-making
Add labels and short explanations
Present the poster to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the process of law-making visually

activities_projects.title: Short Report on Parliament
steps: Write a short report explaining the role of Parliament
Mention law-making and representation of people
Explain why Parliament is important in democracy
